title: BUILD*/TARGET* arguments are not honored if defaults are specified
body:
<!--
If you are reporting a new issue, make sure that we do not have any duplicates
already open. You can ensure this by searching the issue list for this
repository. If there is a duplicate, please close your issue and add a comment
to the existing issue instead.

If you suspect your issue is a bug, please edit your issue description to
include the BUG REPORT INFORMATION shown below. If you fail to provide this
information within 7 days, we cannot debug your issue and will close it. We
will, however, reopen it if you later provide the information.

---------------------------------------------------
BUG REPORT INFORMATION
---------------------------------------------------
Use the commands below to provide key information from your environment:
You do NOT have to include this information if this is a FEATURE REQUEST
-->

**Description**

`BUILD`\*/`TARGET`\* arguments are not honored if defaults are specified

(My use case for defaults is supporting older implementation that do not set them (e.g. Podman v3, `docker build`...))

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. Use the following `Dockerfile`:
   ```Dockerfile
   FROM --platform="${BUILDPLATFORM}" public.ecr.aws/docker/library/busybox

   ARG BUILDPLATFORM=darwin/arm64
   ARG BUILDOS=darwin
   ARG BUILDARCH=arm64
   ARG TARGETPLATFORM=linux/amd64
   ARG TARGETOS=linux
   ARG TARGETARCH=amd64

   RUN echo BUILD $BUILDPLATFORM $BUILDOS $BUILDARCH && \
       echo TARGET $TARGETPLATFORM $TARGETOS $TARGETARCH
   ```
2. Build it with:
   ```console
   podman build --platform darwin/arm64 --manifest foo -f Dockerfile --no-cache .
   ```

(`darwin` is only used to make the issue more obvious)

**Describe the results you received:**

```
STEP 1/8: FROM public.ecr.aws/docker/library/busybox
STEP 2/8: ARG BUILDPLATFORM=darwin/arm64
--> 7d5b24d8c85
STEP 3/8: ARG BUILDOS=darwin
--> e00e70f0725
STEP 4/8: ARG BUILDARCH=arm64
--> d94a12f03ac
STEP 5/8: ARG TARGETPLATFORM=linux/amd64
--> d6714be10d2
STEP 6/8: ARG TARGETOS=linux
--> beab01353a9
STEP 7/8: ARG TARGETARCH=amd64
--> 23f18c6b479
STEP 8/8: RUN echo BUILD $BUILDPLATFORM $BUILDOS $BUILDARCH &&     echo TARGET $TARGETPLATFORM $TARGETOS $TARGETARCH
BUILD darwin/arm64 darwin arm64
TARGET linux/amd64 linux amd64
COMMIT
--> c6dac8b0fa5
c6dac8b0fa58d018ad34256da0ca3acdf37d078e7fe4622356cb97c6b4d12a00
```

**Describe the results you expected:**

```
STEP 1/8: FROM public.ecr.aws/docker/library/busybox
STEP 2/8: ARG BUILDPLATFORM
--> 68cd3f78756
STEP 3/8: ARG BUILDOS
--> 60f7404ab00
STEP 4/8: ARG BUILDARCH
--> 44049bd910d
STEP 5/8: ARG TARGETPLATFORM
--> 6b9c15c8ded
STEP 6/8: ARG TARGETOS
--> 8e68aa4edf8
STEP 7/8: ARG TARGETARCH
--> 556858270e5
STEP 8/8: RUN echo BUILD $BUILDPLATFORM $BUILDOS $BUILDARCH &&     echo TARGET $TARGETPLATFORM $TARGETOS $TARGETARCH
BUILD linux/amd64 linux amd64
TARGET darwin/arm64 darwin arm64
COMMIT
--> 7608415d9c6
7608415d9c68e6a85ae108f3abd20ae862c222d82e01014362e075965b4477bc
```

**Output of `rpm -q buildah` or `apt list buildah`:**

N/A

**Output of `buildah version`:**

```yaml
Version:         1.28.0
Go Version:      go1.19.4
Image Spec:      1.0.2-dev
Runtime Spec:    1.0.2-dev
CNI Spec:        1.0.0
libcni Version:  v1.1.2
image Version:   5.23.0
Git Commit:
Built:           Mon Dec 31 16:00:00 1979
OS/Arch:         linux/amd64
BuildPlatform:   linux/amd64
```

**Output of `podman version` if reporting a `podman build` issue:**

```yaml
Client:       Podman Engine
Version:      4.3.1
API Version:  4.3.1
Go Version:   go1.19.4
Built:        Mon Dec 31 16:00:00 1979
OS/Arch:      linux/amd64
```

**Output of `cat /etc/*release`:**

```shell
DISTRIB_CODENAME=raccoon
DISTRIB_DESCRIPTION="NixOS 22.11 (Raccoon)"
DISTRIB_ID=nixos
DISTRIB_RELEASE="22.11"
LSB_VERSION="22.11 (Raccoon)"
BUG_REPORT_URL="https://github.com/NixOS/nixpkgs/issues"
BUILD_ID="22.11.2179.0218941ea68"
DOCUMENTATION_URL="https://nixos.org/learn.html"
HOME_URL="https://nixos.org/"
ID=nixos
LOGO="nix-snowflake"
NAME=NixOS
PRETTY_NAME="NixOS 22.11 (Raccoon)"
SUPPORT_END="2023-06-30"
SUPPORT_URL="https://nixos.org/community.html"
VERSION="22.11 (Raccoon)"
VERSION_CODENAME=raccoon
VERSION_ID="22.11"
```

**Output of `uname -a`:**

```console
Linux BRUNETM-X1 5.15.90 #1-NixOS SMP Tue Jan 24 06:22:49 UTC 2023 x86_64 GNU/Linux
```

**Output of `cat /etc/containers/storage.conf`:**

```ini
[storage]
driver = "overlay"
graphroot = "/var/lib/containers/storage"
runroot = "/run/containers/storage"
```

comments.body:
Hi @maxbrunet ,

I think this was kept intentionally to match expectations with buildkit, here is the output from buildkit, the thing is `docker build` and `buildkit` have a different behaviour afaics and buildah decided to go with buildkit. Could you please verify and correct me if you think I conveyed anything wrongly :)

Thanks

```console
[fl@fedora exp8]$ sudo docker buildx build --progress=plain --platform darwin/arm64 -f Dockerfile --no-cache .
#1 [internal] load build definition from Dockerfile
#1 transferring dockerfile: 91B done
#1 DONE 0.1s

#2 [internal] load .dockerignore
#2 transferring context: 2B done
#2 DONE 0.2s

#3 [internal] load metadata for public.ecr.aws/docker/library/busybox:latest
#3 DONE 0.5s

#4 [1/2] FROM public.ecr.aws/docker/library/busybox@sha256:7b3ccabffc97de872a30dfd234fd972a66d247c8cfc69b0550f276481852627c
#4 CACHED

#5 [2/2] RUN echo BUILD darwin/arm64 darwin arm64 &&     echo TARGET linux/amd64 linux amd64
#5 0.461 BUILD darwin/arm64 darwin arm64  <--------------- see
#5 0.461 TARGET linux/amd64 linux amd64  <------------------- see
#5 DONE 0.5s

#6 exporting to image
#6 exporting layers
#6 exporting layers 0.3s done
#6 writing image sha256:09c247e7953fabc5db4dad75226d6e07f2e2ed2e53d70c711fb647f5577e2325 done
#6 ERROR: operating system is not supported
```
Thank you @flouthoc for the quick reply, I see, it's an odd choice from buildkit :/
